title: ToolsSymbol
description: A single curated odoo.tools.* export entry in a tools_symbols_<version>.json file (per ADR-0033).

qualified_name.description: Fully-qualified import path. Examples: 'odoo.tools.SQL', 'odoo.tools.safe_eval.safe_eval', 'odoo.tools.image_process'. Must start with 'odoo.tools'.

kind.description: Fixed discriminator for all tool-export symbols (per ADR-0033).

status.description: Lifecycle status in this version: 'stable' = available, 'deprecated' = available but discouraged, 'removed' = absent (do NOT include removed symbols — omit them instead).

signature.description: Optional short signature or type hint shown in tool output. E.g. 'SQL(query: str, *args) -> SQL' or 'class'.

replacement_qname.description: Qualified name of the recommended replacement when status='deprecated'. Null when no direct replacement exists.

note.description: Short human-readable note about the symbol's lifecycle, misuse pattern, or import gotcha. Shown in tool output.
